heading: Good Fit
description: I do my best work when the project calls for craft, not just output. And when the client values the difference.
fitHeading: Where I do my best work
items: Clients who want a thoughtful partner, not just a pair of hands
Projects where quality, performance, and maintainability matter long-term
Teams open to modern, lightweight stacks--like Astro, Svelte, and SvelteKit--over bloated defaults.
Engagements with clear goals and accessible decision-makers.
Startups and small teams that need senior-level front-end expertise without the overhead.
notFit: Projects that need something built fast and cheap. Speed and craft rarely coexist.
Clients who want the latest hyped framework or technologies regardless of whether it fits the problem.
Projects paid entirely in company stock (equity) or speculative work arrangements.
Projects with unclear goals, missing timelines, or loosely defined requirements.
